name: coinbase-cloudflare
description: Coinbase careers page is Cloudflare-protected — plain fetch 403, tier-4 Firecrawl bypasses. Markdown / metadata.title mirror the live response observed 2026-04-19.

stubs.body: Enable JavaScript and cookies to continue.

data.markdown:
󰂢

[Back to jobs](https://www.coinbase.com/careers/positions)

# Senior Software Engineer, Backend

Remote - Singapore

Base salary range (based on your work location and excluding equity and bonus):$191,100 SGD

Job ID#: P75627

[Apply now](https://job-boards.greenhouse.io/embed/job_app?token=7595047)

## About the role

Coinbase is seeking a Senior Software Engineer to join our Backend team. You will design and build the foundational infrastructure that powers millions of crypto transactions per day. We are looking for someone passionate about distributed systems, messaging, and high-throughput services.

## What you'll do

- Design distributed systems for high-throughput payment processing
- Partner with product and security teams on new cryptocurrency integrations
- Mentor junior engineers and drive engineering excellence

## Requirements

- 5+ years of production backend services in Go, Rust, or Java
- Strong distributed-systems and database fundamentals
- Experience with Kubernetes, Kafka, or similar infrastructure
